calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment Request
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Adina Kaye Sivaraman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant MELANIE GARCIA.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Corey Lamb sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $4,558.46
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $683.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $5,242.06

Judgment signed in open court.
